title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 44–45, this part focuses on Unknown person #41, Unknown person #42, Yamato, Luffy as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 22 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
